arts.ttl: Roma Thinking Big for Their Next Coaching Appointment
arts.sum: Roma will have plenty of time to choose their next coach having gone with a glorified caretaker manager. Claudio Ranieri will influence the choice, as he’ll become a consultant to the ownership next year. They have three Italians on their radar. The post Roma Thinking Big for Their Next Coaching Appointment appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Calafiori transfer sparks legal tensions between Roma, Basel, and Bologna
arts.sum: The summer transfer of Riccardo Calafiori from Bologna to Arsenal has ignited a complex legal dispute involving his former clubs, Roma and Basel. The post Calafiori transfer sparks legal tensions between Roma, Basel, and Bologna appeared first on FootItalia.com.
